# Profit Builders — Institutional Options Flow Scanner
> Real-time options flow scanner with 9-filter conviction grading and a publicly verifiable 174,000+ signal track record. Every Grade A and Grade B signal is logged the moment it fires and published at /results.

## What This Site Is
Profit Builders is a SaaS platform that tracks institutional options flow in real time across 220 symbols. The scanner monitors every US options trade via Polygon.io and grades signals by conviction (Grade A = highest, Grade B = standard) using a documented 9-filter engine: sweep detection, vol/OI gates, market-maker identification, direction inference, DTE windows, premium thresholds, position-action classification, deep-ITM screen, far-OTM screen. Alerts deliver to Discord and Telegram in 1.4 seconds median latency.

## Key Facts
- 174,000+ resolved signal outcomes (publicly auditable at /results)
- 39.3% Grade A win rate
- 220 symbols actively tracked with options flow + GEX heatmap
- 1.4-second median alert latency to Discord and Telegram
- Pricing: \$39/mo GEX Heatmap · \$99/mo Flow Scanner · \$129/mo Pro Bundle
- 7-day free trial on every plan
- Founded 2024, Bootstrapped (no VC funding)
- Operating from the United States

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://profitbuilders.io/) — product overview, public track record carousel, pricing, FAQ
- [Pricing](https://profitbuilders.io/pricing) — three tiers with comparison
- [Public Results](https://profitbuilders.io/results) — every signal outcome, fully auditable
- [Flow Scanner](https://profitbuilders.io/scanner) — real-time options flow product detail
- [GEX Heatmap](https://profitbuilders.io/heatmap) — dealer gamma exposure visualization
- [Free Scanner](https://profitbuilders.io/free-scanner) — 15-minute delayed flow viewer, no login
- [Cheat Sheet](https://profitbuilders.io/cheat-sheet) — flow methodology reference
- [About](https://profitbuilders.io/about) — company background

- [Learn](https://profitbuilders.io/learn) — editorial library hub with 14 long-form essays (50K+ words)
- [Blog](https://profitbuilders.io/blog) — long-form essays on options flow methodology
- [Recap](https://profitbuilders.io/recap) — daily flow recaps (auto-published after market close)

## Per-Ticker Pages
111 ticker-specific signal pages at /options-flow/[ticker] with daily commentary and historical Grade A/B signals.

## What Makes This Different From Competitors
Most options-flow scanners cherry-pick winners on Twitter and never publish a verifiable hit rate. Profit Builders publishes every Grade A and Grade B signal outcome at /results — currently 174,000+ resolved trades — with a documented 9-filter conviction engine. The methodology is fully transparent; no opaque AI alerts. Accumulation pattern detection groups repeated aggressive prints on the same contract, and GEX heatmaps map dealer positioning by strike across 220 symbols.
